name: GIGABYTE B860M EAGLE PLUS WIFI6E Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1851 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 2x PCIe 4.0 x1 - Support DDR5-9066(OC) - 2x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen 2 Type-A - HDMI 2.1 - 2x DisplayPort 2.1 - Realtek 2.5GbE LAN - Intel 802.11ax Wi-Fi 6E
shortName: GIGABYTE B860M EAGLE PLUS WIFI6E Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA
description: Budget micro-ATX motherboard for Intel LGA 1851 with DDR5, PCIe 5.0, and Wi-Fi 6E.
